description: Unique identifier for a customer record
business_meaning: Primary customer ID used across CRM and analytics
Human-readable customer name used by sales and support
related_kpi: Customer service resolution and account lookup
notes: PII; may repeat across different people

business_meaning: Primary contact channel for the customer
notes: PII; validate email format; may be null in source files

description: Date the customer was created or signed up
business_meaning: Customer acquisition date used for cohort analysis
related_kpi: New customer acquisition and retention cohorts
notes: UTC date; should not be in the future

description: Unique identifier for a transaction row
business_meaning: Transaction or event record identifier used for audit trails
notes: Primary key in the transactions feed

description: Monetary value recorded on the transaction
business_meaning: Revenue captured from a single transaction
related_kpi: Monthly revenue and average transaction value
notes: USD; non-negative; investigate nulls or negatives

business_meaning: Operational state of the record used to separate completed and pending activity
notes: Ambiguous across sources; validate allowed values before analysis

business_meaning: Demographic attribute used for customer profiling
notes: Optional field; should be a whole number

business_meaning: Timestamp for when the purchase or activity happened
